privacy.introContent: TrustPay ("we", "our", or "us"), operated by NY-Development, provides a merchant-focused payment verification platform for the Ethiopian digital finance ecosystem. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your personal information when you use our mobile application, web dashboard, and related services (collectively, the "Service"). By accessing or using the Service, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by this Privacy Policy.
privacy.collectionContent: We collect information you provide directly (such as when setting up your business, branches, and employees), information generated through your usage, and limited information from third-party payment verification partners.
collectionBullets: Account & Business Registration Data: Business owner full name, email, credentials, TIN, and trading license documents uploaded for approval.
Branch and Employee Data: Branch names, physical locations, branch codes, contact phone numbers, and cashier/manager name, email, role, and branch assignments managed by the Owner.
Settlement Account Data: Bank account numbers and wallet identifiers registered for verification matching. These can be managed at a branch level.
Transaction Verification Data: Payment reference numbers, transaction IDs, verification request timestamps, provider responses including payer name, receiver name, and amounts.
Device & Usage Data: Device model, operating system version, app version, IP address, session duration, feature usage patterns, and crash reports.
OCR & AI Processing Data: Receipt images are processed locally on your device. Trading license uploads are stored securely on remote servers.
Communication Data: Support messages, feedback submissions, and system-level communications between owners and branch employees.
Subscription & Billing Data: Subscription plan type, payment status, renewal dates, and transaction records for branch-level subscription purchases.
privacy.usageContent: We process your personal information only for legitimate business purposes directly related to providing and improving the Service:
usageBullets: Transaction Verification: Matching payment references against banking records via Verify.ET API, isolated for each respective branch.

Multi-Actor Authentication & Management: Enforcing separate login flows for Owners vs. Employees and providing management tools for owners to invite, update, and manage employee accounts and branch assignments.
On-Device AI Processing: Running local inference models (Llama 3.2 via ExecuTorch) to extract reference numbers, categorize transactions, and generate business insights.
Fraud Prevention & Audit: Detecting duplicate submissions, anomaly detection, and keeping immutable logs of actions taken by users and employees.
Service Improvement: Analyzing aggregated, anonymized usage patterns to improve user experience.
Legal Compliance: Fulfilling obligations under Ethiopian financial regulations, anti-money laundering (AML) directives, and verifying trading licenses.
Communication: Sending critical account alerts, security notifications, subscription reminders, and support responses.
privacy.sharingContent: TrustPay does not sell, rent, or trade your personal data. We share data only with Verify.ET API for payment checks, Cloudinary for secure license image storage, Brevo SMTP for transactional emails, and when required by law.
privacy.retentionContent: We retain personal info only as long as necessary: organization data for account lifetime plus 30 days, employee/branch deletion deactivates accounts immediately, verification/audit logs for 3 years, and OTPs for 10 minutes.
privacy.securityContent: We implement industry-standard security including TLS 1.3 encryption in transit, secure database hashing, multi-actor RBAC with branch isolation, local AI sandboxing, and immutable logs.
privacy.rightsDesc: You may have rights to access, rectify, erase, or port your data, object to processing, withdraw consent, or lodge a complaint with the relevant data protection authority.
privacy.childrenContent: The Service is intended for individuals aged 18 and older. We do not knowingly collect data from minors.
privacy.internationalContent: Data is primarily stored in Africa/EEA. We ensure adequate protective measures are in place for any international transfers.
privacy.cookiesContent: Our web dashboard uses strictly necessary session cookies for authentication. We do not use advertising trackers or third-party analytics.
privacy.changesContent: We may update this policy periodically. Material changes will be notified at least 14 days prior to taking effect.
privacy.questionsDesc: For privacy-related inquiries, contact our Privacy Team:

securityDetails.commitmentContent: At TrustPay, security is the foundational principle upon which every line of code, every API, and every infrastructure decision is built. As a platform handling sensitive financial verification data for Ethiopian merchants, we hold ourselves to the highest standards.
securityDetails.rbacContent: Multi-actor role-based access control (RBAC) ensures employees can only access data scoped to their assigned branch. Owner accounts manage roles, permissions, and invite or deactivate cashiers/managers under their organization.

termsOfUse.eligibilityContent: To use the Service, you must be a registered business entity with valid TIN and trading licenses, and take full responsibility for all activities under your account, including invited employee activities.
termsOfUse.billingContent: TrustPay plans are charged per registered branch. Business owners must maintain an active subscription for each configured branch to allow verification access for employee sub-accounts at that branch.

contact.title: Contact Support
contact.subtitle: Need assistance? Fill out the details below. We'll automatically lookup your transaction history and account details to resolve requests quickly.
contact.placeholderSubject: e.g. Refund request for order overpayment
contact.placeholderMessage: Explain your request or issue in detail here...
contact.errSubjectDesc: Please enter a brief subject for your request.
contact.errMessageDesc: Please write details about your issue or refund request.
contact.successDesc: We have received your request. Our support team will review and contact you via email shortly.
contact.failedDesc: Failed to send message. Please check your connection and try again.
